ddls:
CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the transaction */,
  "ledger" TEXT /* Ledger code for the transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account associated with the transaction */,
  "part_no" TEXT /* Part number of the item involved in the transaction */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project associated with the transaction */,
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the contact associated with the transaction */,
  "unit_code" TEXT /* Unit code for the item (e.g., PCS, KG) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item involved in the transaction */,
  "unit_price" REAL /* Unit price of the item */,
  "debit_credit" TEXT /* Debit or Credit indicator for the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency code for the transaction */,
  "exchange_rate" REAL /* Exchange rate used for currency conversion */,
  "original_amount" REAL /* Original amount of the transaction in the original currency */,
  "base_amount" REAL /* Base amount of the transaction in the base currency */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the transaction occurred */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* Invoice or purchase order number */,
  "purchase_order_number" TEXT /* Purchase order number */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Purchase, Sale, Transfer) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the transaction (e.g., Pending, Completed, Canceled) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the transaction */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_contact_id FOREIGN KEY ("contact_id") REFERENCES contacts ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_currency FOREIGN KEY ("currency") REFERENCES currencies ("currency_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account */,
  "account_type" TEXT /* Type of the account (e.g., Asset, Liability, Equity, Income, Expense) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the account */,
  "parent_account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent account */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the account */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the account balance was updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the account (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the account was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the account */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_parent_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_code" TEXT /* Code of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* Name of the project manager */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the project */,
  "current_spent" REAL /* Amount currently spent on the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed, On Hold) */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site associated with the project */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the project */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the project was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact */,
  "contact_type" TEXT /* Type of the contact (e.g., Supplier, Customer, Internal) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the contact */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the contact */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the contact */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the contact */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the contact */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of the contact */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the contact (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the contact was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the contact */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the contact was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "currencies" (
  "currency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each currency */,
  "currency_code" TEXT /* Code of the currency (e.g., C06) */,
  "currency_name" TEXT /* Name of the currency (e.g., US Dollar) */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the currency (e.g., $) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the currency (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User who created the currency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the currency was created */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* User who last updated the currency */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the currency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("currency_id")
)
